parameters-en.Frequency: Determines the crossover point at which your signal is split into low and high frequencies. Any signal above this frequency is sent to Path A (upper); any signal below this frequency is sent to Path B (lower).
parameters-en.Reverse: When set to "On," reverses the path assignments. (Any signal above the crossover frequency is sent to Path B, any signal below the crossover frequency is sent to Path A.)
